nodes.speaker: Kim Kitsuragi
nodes.text: The lieutenant waits for you to choose the next lead.

choices.text: Ask him to follow your lead.
choices.setsObjective: Question Klaasje, then check the balcony lead.
Use the world map to move between active investigation spaces.

choices.text: Run a Logic check on the case board.

nodes.speaker: Kim Kitsuragi
nodes.text: He nods once. The investigation continues.

nodes.speaker: Kim Kitsuragi
nodes.text: He marks the Whirling and your room as active points of interest. Other places should unlock through leads, not magic.

nodes.speaker: LOGIC
nodes.text: The room, lobby, and balcony form a clean chain. Klaasje's window is the next pressure point.

nodes.speaker: LOGIC
nodes.text: The board stays messy. You need more testimony before the chain becomes obvious.

nodes.speaker: Klaasje
nodes.text: She watches the room from the window, cigarette smoke hanging in the air.

choices.setsObjective: Compare Klaasje's testimony with Kim's case board.
Go to the balcony and recover the shoe lead.

nodes.speaker: Klaasje
nodes.text: She gives you enough to keep moving, but not enough to trust her completely.

nodes.speaker: Klaasje
nodes.text: The balcony becomes a lead. Check it from the world map when you are ready.

nodes.speaker: Klaasje
nodes.text: For a second she stops performing. That second is enough to become part of your version of the case.
